plugins.name: QT-claude-kit
plugins.description: Specialized dev agents (e2e, refactor, docs, database, ts/js) and skills (e2e-testing, database-migrations, web-security, javascript-typescript-security, backend-patterns, frontend-patterns, api-design, docker-patterns, js-ts-testing, postgres-patterns, deployment-patterns) and commands (build-fix, code-review, refactor-clean, update-docs, skill-create) and opt-in rules (skill-index, coding-style, git-workflow, performance) and hooks (commit-guard, auto-format).
